platform.description: Conversion platform this connector belongs to. Tabs in the Conversion Events UI are scoped by this value. Existing records without a platform default to facebook (for facebook_capi) or other.

filter_verticals.description: JSON array of vertical codes to match against the lead's vertical field. Empty array = match all

filter_brands.description: JSON array of brand names to match. Empty array = match all

filter_suppliers.description: JSON array of supplier names or SIDs to match. Empty array = match all

filter_supplier_types.description: JSON array of supplier types (Internal, External, Calls) to match. Empty array = match all

filter_routes.description: JSON array of lead_route keys (standard, direct, data, event, queue) to match. Empty array = match all processing routes

filter_conditions.description: JSON array of {field, operator, value} conditions evaluated against enriched lead data (including calculated fields). All must match for the connector to fire. Empty = no conditions. Operators: equals, not_equals, contains, not_contains, starts_with, ends_with, is_empty, is_not_empty

fb_access_token.description: Facebook CAPI access token (masked in UI)

received_event_name.description: Event name fired on the Qualified trigger (key on_received). Falls back to 'Lead' if blank.

sold_event_name.description: Event name fired on the Sold trigger. No fallback — if blank, the Sold event does not fire.

unsold_event_name.description: Event name fired on the Unsold trigger. Falls back to 'Lead' if blank.

queued_event_name.description: Event name fired on the Queued trigger. Falls back to 'Lead' if blank.

dq_event_name.description: Event name fired on the Disqualified trigger. No fallback — if blank, the DQ event does not fire.

rejected_event_name.description: Event name fired on the Rejected trigger. Falls back to 'Lead' if blank.

duplicates_event_name.description: Event name fired on the Duplicates trigger. Falls back to 'Lead' if blank.

auto_hash_capi.description: When true, automatically SHA-256 hashes Meta-required user_data fields (em, ph, fn, ln, ct, st, zp, country, external_id, db, ge) after normalizing. Manual |sha256 transforms on individual tokens are respected and not double-hashed.

headers.description: JSON array of {key, value} header rows

trigger_data_overrides.description: JSON map of trigger_key -> { custom_data field: value } overrides applied on top of the template's custom_data for that trigger. Values support {{token}} placeholders. e.g. {"on_dq":{"qualification_status":"Disqualified Lead"}}

triggers.description: JSON array of trigger keys derived from the lead_status system field (on_received=Qualified, on_sold, on_unsold, on_dq=Disqualified, on_queued, on_rejected, on_duplicates, plus any custom lead_status values such as on_24m_lead). Empty array = fire on every lead (intake), gated only by filters.
